summary.en: AI agents that convert and retain patients for digital and telehealth clinics.
summary.zh: 為數位與遠距醫療診所轉換並留住病患的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Cenote's AI sales reps run abandoned-cart and win-back campaigns, reaching cold leads instantly across channels to lift clinic conversion.
highlight.zh: Cenote 的 AI 業務代表執行棄單與召回行動，立即跨管道接觸已冷卻的潛在客戶，提升診所轉換率。

summary.en: Insider threat detection for the modern enterprise.
summary.zh: 為現代企業打造的內部威脅偵測。

highlight.en: Candor tells security teams who to watch before damage occurs, with zero tuning and day-one detection of IP leaks and AI-tool misuse hidden in noisy alerts.
highlight.zh: Candor 無需調校、首日即可偵測，揪出嘈雜警報中的 IP 外洩與 AI 工具濫用，在損害前告知資安團隊該盯緊誰。

summary.en: Automates accruals to eliminate spreadsheets and speed up month-end close.
summary.zh: 自動化應計項目，消除試算表並加快月底結帳。

highlight.en: Mesh automates 90% of accruals by capturing real-time signals from AP inboxes, Slack, Teams, and journals, turning fragmented data into audit-ready outputs.
highlight.zh: Mesh 從應付帳款信箱、Slack、Teams 與分錄擷取即時訊號，自動化 90% 應計流程，化零散資料為可稽核成果。

summary.en: Helps software companies sell to the government.
summary.zh: 協助軟體公司向政府銷售。

highlight.en: Archon cuts the FedRAMP federal compliance timeline from 16 to 6 months and reduces costs by $1M per company.
highlight.zh: Archon 將 FedRAMP 聯邦合規時程從 16 個月縮短至 6 個月，並為每家公司降低 100 萬美元成本。

summary.en: Real-time AI voice translation for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的即時 AI 語音翻譯。

highlight.en: Pinch offers robust live speech translation models covering 50+ languages with simple integration for developers.
highlight.zh: Pinch 提供穩定的即時語音翻譯模型，涵蓋逾 50 種語言，並讓開發者輕鬆整合。

summary.en: An AI-powered company operating system.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的公司作業系統。

highlight.en: Rebolt sits on top of your existing systems and builds tailor-made AI software to drive business outcomes.
highlight.zh: Rebolt 架在你既有的系統之上，打造量身訂製的 AI 軟體以驅動業務成果。

summary.en: Test, monitor, and improve your voice agents.
summary.zh: 測試、監控並改善你的語音代理。

highlight.en: Roark has processed over 10M minutes of calls, pairing 40+ built-in metrics with end-to-end simulations and configurable personas to catch voice-agent failures.
highlight.zh: Roark 已處理逾 1,000 萬分鐘通話，結合 40 多項內建指標與端對端模擬及可設定角色，揪出語音代理失誤。

summary.en: AI-powered hardware systems design software for mission-critical industries.
summary.zh: 為任務關鍵產業打造的 AI 硬體系統設計軟體。

highlight.en: Dalus lets aerospace, defense, and robotics engineers trace requirements, run analyses, and parse documentation to keep system models aligned in real time.
highlight.zh: Dalus 讓航太、國防與機器人工程師追蹤需求、執行分析並解析文件，使系統模型即時保持一致。

summary.en: Vercel for GPUs — effortless ML model training via a simple CLI.
summary.zh: GPU 界的 Vercel，透過簡易 CLI 輕鬆訓練 ML 模型。

highlight.en: TensorPool's CLI lets you just describe your ML job while it handles GPU orchestration and execution at half the cost of major cloud providers.
highlight.zh: TensorPool 的 CLI 讓你只需描述 ML 工作，便代為處理 GPU 調度與執行，成本僅為主要雲端供應商的一半。

summary.en: A collaborative, AI-native IDE for hardware engineers.
summary.zh: 為硬體工程師打造的協作式 AI 原生 IDE。

highlight.en: Artifact accelerates the full hardware lifecycle from design to sustainment, auto-generating traceable artifacts tied to a single source of truth.
highlight.zh: Artifact 加速從設計到維護的完整硬體生命週期，自動產生可追溯且綁定單一真實來源的工件。

summary.en: Open source React.js library for adding AI chat to apps.
summary.zh: 用於為應用程式加入 AI 聊天的開源 React.js 函式庫。

highlight.en: Used by LangChain and Browser Use, assistant-ui pairs an open source TypeScript/React library with a backend service plus LangGraph and Vercel AI integrations.
highlight.zh: assistant-ui 已被 LangChain、Browser Use 採用，將開源 TypeScript/React 函式庫與後端服務結合，並整合 LangGraph 與 Vercel AI SDK。

summary.en: Automated revenue cycle management, starting with dental offices.
summary.zh: 自動化營收週期管理，從牙科診所起步。

highlight.en: Egress Health's AI agents handle eligibility, claims scrubbing, payment posting, and denials, cutting 1-2 staff and collecting 5-15% more revenue monthly.
highlight.zh: Egress Health 的 AI 代理處理資格、理賠清理、款項入帳與拒賠，減少 1 至 2 名員工並每月多收 5% 至 15% 營收。

summary.en: A disease-focused biotech building multiple potential blockbuster drugs.
summary.zh: 聚焦特定疾病、打造多款潛在重磅新藥的生技公司。

highlight.en: Founded after the founder's daughter was diagnosed with Rett Syndrome, Uncommon uses a polytherapy strategy to design therapeutics that could deliver a cure.
highlight.zh: 在創辦人女兒確診雷特氏症後成立，Uncommon 採多藥併用策略設計療法，合起來有望帶來治癒方案。

summary.en: An AI documentation engineer that tests and auto-improves stale product docs.
summary.zh: 測試並自動改善過時產品文件的 AI 文件工程師。

highlight.en: Quantstruct uses multiple AI agents to find knowledge gaps and navigate software in a browser, generating validated docs with embedded screenshots and video.
highlight.zh: Quantstruct 運用多個 AI 代理找出知識缺口並在瀏覽器操作軟體，產出經驗證、內嵌截圖與影片的文件。

summary.en: AI for air traffic control.
summary.zh: 用於空中交通管制的 AI。

highlight.en: Enhanced Radar is building better, safer air traffic control systems.
highlight.zh: Enhanced Radar 正在打造更好、更安全的空中交通管制系統。

summary.en: Helps companies win government funding with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 協助公司贏得政府資金。

highlight.en: Candor injects AI agents into procurement to surface and actively pursue opportunities, giving defense and deeptech startups the reach of large contractors.
highlight.zh: Candor 將 AI 代理注入採購流程，主動發掘並爭取機會，讓國防與深科技新創擁有與大型承包商同等的能力。

summary.en: Lovable for Chrome plugins — make websites work exactly how you want.
summary.zh: Chrome 外掛版的 Lovable，讓網站完全照你的想法運作。

highlight.en: Tweeks.io lets users build Chrome plugins to make websites behave exactly how they want.
highlight.zh: Tweeks.io 讓使用者打造 Chrome 外掛，使網站完全照自己的想法運作。

summary.en: An agentic AI Word editor that edits documents on command.
summary.zh: 可依指令編輯文件的代理式 AI Word 編輯器。

highlight.en: Praxim applies edits across an entire Word document with formatting control, file and web context, and personal preferences — just describe the change.
highlight.zh: Praxim 在整份 Word 文件套用編輯，掌握格式、檔案與網路情境及個人偏好，只要描述需求便自動實作。

summary.en: Voice AI for home services.
summary.zh: 為居家服務打造的語音 AI。

highlight.en: Hey Telo provides voice AI built for home services businesses.
highlight.zh: Hey Telo 為居家服務業者提供量身打造的語音 AI。

summary.en: A DeFi trading platform for memecoins, perpetuals, and yield.
summary.zh: 用於迷因幣、永續合約與收益的 DeFi 交易平台。

highlight.en: Axiom is a decentralized-finance trading platform offering memecoins, perpetuals, and yield; since launch it has reached $10M MRR and $5M monthly net profit.
highlight.zh: Axiom 是提供迷因幣、永續合約與收益的去中心化金融平台，自上線以來已達每月經常性收入 1,000 萬、月淨利 500 萬美元。

summary.en: Character.AI with real-time video avatars.
summary.zh: 搭載即時影片虛擬形象的 Character.AI。

highlight.en: Dollyglot turns a photo and a voice into a real-time video avatar you can talk with, like chatting with Harry Potter or brainstorming with Elon Musk.
highlight.zh: Dollyglot 將一張照片與一段聲音變成可即時對話的影片形象，例如和哈利波特聊天或與馬斯克腦力激盪。

summary.en: An AI analyst for electricity markets.
summary.zh: 電力市場的 AI 分析師。

highlight.en: Dartboard is an AI analyst for electricity markets, starting with owners of grid-scale battery projects.
highlight.zh: Dartboard 是電力市場的 AI 分析師，從電網級電池專案的擁有者切入。

summary.en: Voice AI for medical language translation across voice and video.
summary.zh: 跨語音與視訊的醫療語言翻譯語音 AI。

highlight.en: Vocality lets doctors speak any language, aiming to replace the outdated, costly human translator call centers hospitals rely on for non-English patients.
highlight.zh: Vocality 讓醫師能以任何語言溝通，目標取代醫院為非英語病患所仰賴、過時且昂貴的人工翻譯客服中心。

summary.en: A zero-code network tracer for your entire infrastructure.
summary.zh: 為整套基礎設施打造的零程式碼網路追蹤器。

highlight.en: Like inspect element for your whole infra, Subtrace shows every HTTP request in real time via BPF without root or code changes; it has ~2.5k GitHub stars.
highlight.zh: Subtrace 宛如整套基礎設施的檢視元素，透過 BPF 即時顯示每個 HTTP 請求，無需 root 或改碼，GitHub 約 2,500 顆星。

summary.en: AWS for AI agents — integrate agents into any application via simple APIs.
summary.zh: AI 代理界的 AWS，透過簡易 API 將代理整合進任何應用程式。

highlight.en: Truffle AI exposes AI agents as simple APIs callable anywhere; developers have used it to add support agents to WhatsApp and analytics agents to Slack.
highlight.zh: Truffle AI 將 AI 代理以可隨處呼叫的簡易 API 呈現；開發者已用它在 WhatsApp 加入客服代理、在 Slack 加入分析代理。

summary.en: Custom AI experts that map answers one model can't.
summary.zh: 客製化 AI 專家，繪製單一模型無法處理的解答。

highlight.en: Serno assembles 3-5 AI experts across Claude, GPT, and Gemini that debate contradictions and map the answer as a navigable, shareable canvas.
highlight.zh: Serno 在 Claude、GPT 與 Gemini 上組建 3 至 5 位 AI 專家，互相辯論矛盾，並將答案繪製成可瀏覽、可分享的畫布。

summary.en: A daily productivity tracker that helps teams stay focused on shipping.
summary.zh: 協助團隊專注交付的每日生產力追蹤工具。

highlight.en: Sublingual's desktop app helps teams stay focused on shipping.
highlight.zh: Sublingual 的桌面應用程式協助團隊專注於交付產品。

summary.en: An AI-maximalist software holding company run by AI agents.
summary.zh: 由 AI 代理營運、奉行 AI 極大化的軟體控股公司。

highlight.en: Rocketable acquires profitable software products and replaces human teams with AI agents, aiming to eventually operate entire companies with zero employees.
highlight.zh: Rocketable 收購獲利的軟體產品，並以 AI 代理取代人類團隊，最終目標是以零員工營運整家公司。

summary.en: Outbound sequencing infrastructure for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創打造的外撥序列基礎設施。

highlight.en: Verbiflow helps startups reach prospects across email, LinkedIn, and cold calls while keeping the team aligned on every conversation and response.
highlight.zh: Verbiflow 協助新創透過電子郵件、LinkedIn 與陌生電話接觸潛在客戶，並讓整個團隊對每段對話與回覆保持一致。

summary.en: The social network layer for AI apps.
summary.zh: AI 應用的社群網路層。

highlight.en: A1Zap is a social network where people create tools, games, chatbots, and interactive experiences, then share them instantly with friends and their campus.
highlight.zh: A1Zap 是一個社群網路，讓人們創作工具、遊戲、聊天機器人與互動體驗，並立即分享給朋友與校園。

summary.en: A risk decisioning platform for banks.
summary.zh: 為銀行打造的風險決策平台。

highlight.en: Tejas AI lets decision-makers develop and evaluate credit rules more quickly and effectively, removing uncertainty from the process.
highlight.zh: Tejas AI 讓決策者更快速、更有效地制定並評估信用規則，消除流程中的不確定性。

summary.en: How elite law firms do intake.
summary.zh: 頂尖律師事務所進行案件接收的方式。

highlight.en: Caseflood.ai provides the intake system used by elite law firms.
highlight.zh: Caseflood.ai 提供頂尖律師事務所所使用的案件接收系統。

summary.en: An AI automation platform for home services contractors.
summary.zh: 為居家服務承包商打造的 AI 自動化平台。

highlight.en: Maive is an AI automation platform built for contractors who provide home services.
highlight.zh: Maive 是專為提供居家服務的承包商打造的 AI 自動化平台。

summary.en: The AI growth engine for industrials.
summary.zh: 工業領域的 AI 成長引擎。

highlight.en: Paragon is the AI growth engine for distributors and manufacturers, freeing up staff and growing revenue on autopilot.
highlight.zh: Paragon 是經銷商與製造商的 AI 成長引擎，釋放人力並自動增長營收。

summary.en: An AI copilot for ambulance agencies (EMS).
summary.zh: 為救護車機構（EMS）打造的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Amby Health analyzes EMS patient reports in seconds to code claims accurately and flag liability and care risks, replacing large back-office teams.
highlight.zh: Amby Health 數秒內分析 EMS 病患報告以精準編碼理賠並標記責任與照護風險，取代龐大的後勤團隊。

summary.en: An AI compliance co-pilot for regulated financial businesses.
summary.zh: 為受監管金融業者打造的 AI 合規副駕。

highlight.en: Built by an ex-Revolut product team, Cardamon ingests regulation, identifies what applies to each firm, and turns it into product requirements in minutes.
highlight.zh: 由前 Revolut 產品團隊打造，Cardamon 吸收法規、判別各家公司適用部分，並在數分鐘內轉化為產品需求。

summary.en: A private digital home for your personal memories that grows with you.
summary.zh: 陪你一起成長、收藏個人回憶的私密數位家園。

highlight.en: Oki Home uses fully private local AI to store your personal memories and experiences, growing over time to understand and help you in your life.
highlight.zh: Oki Home 採用完全私密的本機 AI 儲存你的個人回憶與經歷，隨時間成長以理解並協助你的生活。

summary.en: An AI character chat app for immersive stories and conversations.
summary.zh: 提供沉浸式故事與對話的 AI 角色聊天應用。

highlight.en: Swerve lets users discover unique AI characters, choose their own persona, and dive into chats that evolve naturally with no scripts and no limits.
highlight.zh: Swerve 讓使用者探索獨特的 AI 角色、選擇自己的人設，並投入自然演進、無腳本且無限制的對話。

summary.en: AI sales teams that fill dental practices' chairs.
summary.zh: 為牙科診所填滿診療椅的 AI 業務團隊。

highlight.en: 10x taps a practice's patient database to find overdue recalls, lapsed patients, and unscheduled treatment plans, then rebooks them via AI calling and texting.
highlight.zh: 10x 連接診所病患資料庫，找出逾期回診、流失病患與未排程治療計畫，再透過 AI 通話與簡訊重新預約。

summary.en: A real-time AI translator for global sales, marketing, and support.
summary.zh: 為全球銷售、行銷與支援打造的即時 AI 翻譯器。

highlight.en: Used by Snowflake and PagerDuty in Zoom and in-person meetings, Cuckoo learns technical keywords to interpret into 20+ industry-customized languages.
highlight.zh: Cuckoo 被 Snowflake、PagerDuty 用於 Zoom 與實體會議，從關鍵字學習技術細節，翻譯成 20 多種依產業客製的語言。

summary.en: Curated stories, delivered every day.
summary.zh: 每日精選故事。

highlight.en: Olive delivers curated stories every day.
highlight.zh: Olive 每日提供精選的故事。

summary.en: AI agents for complex engineering projects.
summary.zh: 為複雜工程專案打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Macadamia automates engineering and business processes for mechanical engineering, manufacturing, and construction, integrating with data sources and tools.
highlight.zh: Macadamia 為機械工程、製造與營建自動化工程與商業流程，整合各種資料來源、技術文件與第三方工具。

summary.en: AI software for healthcare provider credentialing.
summary.zh: 用於醫療提供者資格認證的 AI 軟體。

highlight.en: Harbera continuously monitors and helps admin teams re-credential doctors, preventing denied claims, care disruptions, and lost out-of-network revenue.
highlight.zh: Harbera 持續監控並協助行政團隊為醫師重新認證，避免理賠遭拒、照護中斷與脫離網絡而損失的營收。

summary.en: A growth operations data platform with a self-healing semantic layer.
summary.zh: 搭載自我修復語意層的成長營運資料平台。

highlight.en: Lopus builds a self-healing semantic layer that captures every metric, definition, and edge case once so AI can be trusted like a calculator — no SQL needed.
highlight.zh: Lopus 打造自我修復的語意層，一次性收錄每個指標、定義與邊界情況，讓 AI 像計算機般可信，且無需 SQL。

summary.en: An AI platform simplifying how healthcare companies connect with medical experts.
summary.zh: 簡化醫療公司與醫療專家連結方式的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: G LNK uses proprietary matching and ranking models to instantly identify the most qualified medical experts, with compliance built in to meet strict standards.
highlight.zh: G LNK 運用專有的配對與排序模型，以內建合規即時找出最合格的醫療專家，符合嚴格的法規標準。

summary.en: Turns complex API integrations into drop-in full-stack libraries.
summary.zh: 將複雜的 API 整合轉為即插即用的全端函式庫。

highlight.en: ReJot's open-source framework Fragno packages backend endpoints, storage patterns, and frontend utilities into reusable blocks, so customers configure not code.
highlight.zh: ReJot 的開源框架 Fragno 將後端端點、儲存模式與前端工具打包成可重用區塊，讓客戶以設定取代撰寫程式碼。

summary.en: AI agents that automate enterprise software processes.
summary.zh: 自動化企業軟體流程的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Agentin AI's agents move data and act across customized systems like Salesforce, NetSuite, and SAP, learning from failures with reinforcement learning.
highlight.zh: Agentin AI 的代理在 Salesforce、NetSuite、SAP 等客製系統間搬移資料並執行操作，運用強化學習從失敗中學習。

summary.en: Automates urban planning so cities can build cheaper and faster.
summary.zh: 自動化都市規劃，讓城市更省錢、更快地建設。

highlight.en: Waypoint is an AI city planner that generates civil infrastructure studies in months not years and at 30% of the cost, tackling US cities' $50B planning spend.
highlight.zh: Waypoint 是 AI 城市規劃師，以三成成本在數月而非數年內產出土木基礎設施研究，因應美國每年 500 億美元的規劃支出。

summary.en: AI employees for hotels, starting with a phone receptionist.
summary.zh: 為飯店打造的 AI 員工，從電話接待員起步。

highlight.en: Riviera's AI handles front-desk inquiries, in-room dining, and reservations 24/7 in any language, integrating with fragmented hotel reservation systems.
highlight.zh: Riviera 的 AI 全天候以任何語言處理櫃台詢問、客房餐飲與訂房，並整合飯店零散的訂房與營運系統。

summary.en: An SDK to run transformer models anywhere.
summary.zh: 讓 Transformer 模型在任何地方執行的 SDK。

highlight.en: Exla aggressively quantizes LLMs, VLMs, and custom models to cut memory footprint by up to 80% and accelerate inference 3-20x with just a few lines of code.
highlight.zh: Exla 積極量化 LLM、VLM 與自訂模型，僅需幾行程式碼即可將記憶體占用降低達 80%、推論加速 3 至 20 倍。

summary.en: A stablecoin neobank for emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場打造的穩定幣新型銀行。

highlight.en: Karsa lets over 100M people in emerging markets buy dollar-denominated stablecoins, save in US bank accounts, and spend anywhere with a Visa card.
highlight.zh: Karsa 讓新興市場逾 1 億人購買以美元計價的穩定幣、存進美國銀行帳戶，並以 Visa 卡在任何地方消費。

summary.en: AI-powered eligibility evaluations for affordable housing.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的可負擔住房資格評估。

highlight.en: Tire Swing manages resident certification end-to-end for PBRA, LIHTC, and Housing Voucher properties, serving as a drop-in replacement for outside consultants.
highlight.zh: Tire Swing 為 PBRA、LIHTC 與住房券物業端對端管理住戶認證，可直接取代第三方顧問與稽核人員。

summary.en: Customer context for agents — one queryable profile from your whole stack.
summary.zh: 為代理提供客戶情境，從整套工具串成可查詢的單一檔案。

highlight.en: Outlit resolves fragmented identity across Stripe, Slack, Gmail, and more, exposing one complete customer profile via CLI, MCP, and API for every agent.
highlight.zh: Outlit 整合 Stripe、Slack、Gmail 等工具的零散身分，透過 CLI、MCP 與 API 為每位成員與代理提供完整客戶檔案。

summary.en: High-thrust, reusable space vehicles for satellite defense.
summary.zh: 用於衛星防禦的高推力、可重複使用太空載具。

highlight.en: Orbital Operations is building a reusable space vehicle whose cryogenic management system delivers over 100x the thrust of current in-space propulsion.
highlight.zh: Orbital Operations 正打造可重複使用太空載具，其低溫管理系統推力超過現有在軌推進的 100 倍，以保護關鍵衛星。

summary.en: Turns traditional companies into AI companies.
summary.zh: 把傳統公司轉型為 AI 公司。

highlight.en: Sennu AI builds AI systems that fundamentally transform how a business operates.
highlight.zh: Sennu AI 打造從根本上改變企業營運方式的 AI 系統。

summary.en: The AI front door for law firms.
summary.zh: 律師事務所的 AI 前門。

highlight.en: OpenIntake boosts law firm revenue by converting callers into clients around the clock.
highlight.zh: OpenIntake 全天候將來電者轉化為客戶，提升律師事務所的營收。

summary.en: AI tutors for standardized exam prep.
summary.zh: 為標準化考試準備打造的 AI 家教。

highlight.en: Miyagi Labs gives students an AI tutor, personalized analytics, and tailored practice across exams like the SAT, ACT, SHSAT, UTME, KCSE, NEET, and CAT.
highlight.zh: Miyagi Labs 為學生提供 AI 家教、個人化分析與客製練習，涵蓋 SAT、ACT、SHSAT、UTME、KCSE、NEET、CAT 等全球考試。

summary.en: A vintage marketplace curated by AI.
summary.zh: 由 AI 策展的古著二手市集。

highlight.en: Retrofit uses AI agents to analyze social trends, sales data, and personal style, curating trending vintage pieces that fit each shopper's taste and budget.
highlight.zh: Retrofit 運用 AI 代理分析社群趨勢、銷售數據與個人風格，精選符合每位買家品味、尺寸與預算的熱門古著。

summary.en: An AI co-pilot for building plan review and building code compliance.
summary.zh: 用於建築圖審與建築法規合規的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Permitify helps understaffed city build-plan reviewers 10x their productivity, cutting permit issuance time and keeping the department's revenue intact.
highlight.zh: Permitify 協助人力不足的城市建築圖審人員提升十倍生產力，縮短核發建照時間並維持建築部門的營收。

summary.en: An integration layer giving you or your agent safe access to hundreds of integrations.
summary.zh: 為你或你的代理提供數百種整合安全存取的整合層。

highlight.en: Corsair handles the 95% of integration code that is identical boilerplate plumbing, so you only write the lines unique to your use case; your data stays yours.
highlight.zh: Corsair 處理整合中佔 95%、千篇一律的樣板工作，讓你只需寫專屬用例的少數程式碼，資料仍歸你所有。

summary.en: Embedded sandboxes for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的嵌入式沙箱。

highlight.en: Butter is building bVisor, a lightweight sandbox runtime that embeds into your local process to give agents a safe bash environment without VM or remote infra.
highlight.zh: Butter 正打造 bVisor，輕量沙箱執行環境，可嵌入本機程序，為代理提供安全 bash 環境，免去 VM 或遠端基礎設施負擔。

summary.en: The first go-to-market data platform built for selling into healthcare.
summary.zh: 首個專為向醫療業銷售而打造的市場進入資料平台。

highlight.en: Paratus Health is building the first GTM data platform for healthcare sales, from a team that scaled voice agents to 35+ outpatient facilities in under a year.
highlight.zh: Paratus Health 正打造首個面向醫療銷售的市場進入資料平台，團隊曾在一年內將語音代理擴展至超過 35 間門診機構。

summary.en: AI agents built for the commercial insurance industry.
summary.zh: 為商業保險業打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: CopyCat builds AI specifically for commercial insurance, saving brokers 5-10 hours a week by automating repetitive CSR and sales tasks.
highlight.zh: CopyCat 專為商業保險打造 AI，透過自動化重複的客服與銷售工作，每週為經紀人節省 5 至 10 小時。

summary.en: Agent teams that deliver professional work products for experts.
summary.zh: 為專業人士交付專業工作成果的代理團隊。

highlight.en: TamLabs' agent teams deliver professional work products for experts across law, finance, and consulting with speed and precision.
highlight.zh: TamLabs 的代理團隊為法律、金融與顧問領域的專家快速且精準地交付專業工作成果。

summary.en: Helps GTM teams ramp reps faster and spread the top-rep sales playbook.
summary.zh: 協助市場進入團隊更快培訓業務並擴散頂尖業務的銷售劇本。

highlight.en: AEs at Cursor, Pylon, and Warp use Cedar to save 75% of admin time on CRM updates, follow-ups, and deal strategy; the team is ex-Figma, Notion, and Intuit.
highlight.zh: Cursor、Pylon、Warp 的客戶經理用 Cedar 在 CRM 更新、跟進與成交策略上省 75% 行政時間；團隊出身 Figma、Notion、Intuit。

summary.en: Book and manage all of your golf tee times in one place.
summary.zh: 在同一處預約並管理你所有的高爾夫開球時段。

highlight.en: Tee Time Tommy lets golfers book and manage all of their tee times in one place.
highlight.zh: Tee Time Tommy 讓高爾夫球友在同一處預約並管理所有的開球時段。

summary.en: A fintech company based in the US.
summary.zh: 一家位於美國的金融科技公司。

highlight.en: Hudson is a US-based fintech company (meethudson.com).
highlight.zh: Hudson 是一家總部設於美國的金融科技公司（meethudson.com）。

summary.en: Dex, the AI coworker in Chrome — like Cursor for knowledge work.
summary.zh: Chrome 中的 AI 同事 Dex，宛如知識工作版的 Cursor。

highlight.en: From research lab ThirdLayer, Dex turns the browser into a multimodal workspace that understands intent via voice, text, and action, automating tedious steps.
highlight.zh: 出自研究實驗室 ThirdLayer，Dex 將瀏覽器化為多模態工作空間，透過語音、文字與操作理解意圖，自動化繁瑣步驟。

summary.en: Infrastructure for computer-use agents.
summary.zh: 為電腦操作代理打造的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Invo provides infrastructure for computer-use agents.
highlight.zh: Invo 為電腦操作代理提供基礎設施。

summary.en: An AI secretary for email and calendar — the first AI-native inbox.
summary.zh: 電子郵件與行事曆的 AI 秘書，首個 AI 原生收件匣。

highlight.en: Stamp acts like a second brain: it responds to emails in your voice, filters out inbox noise, tracks action items, and automates manual inbox tasks.
highlight.zh: Stamp 宛如第二大腦：以你的語氣回覆郵件、過濾收件匣雜訊、追蹤待辦，並自動化你目前在信箱裡手動處理的工作。

summary.en: The world's first AI energy developer for renewable projects.
summary.zh: 全球首個用於再生能源專案的 AI 能源開發商。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-Citadel trader Alex Fuster, Astro uses AI to find land and secure cheap grid connections, avoiding costs that sink 80-90% of renewable projects.
highlight.zh: 由前 Citadel 交易員 Alex Fuster 創立，Astro 以 AI 尋找土地並低成本取得電網接點，避開導致 80% 至 90% 再生專案失敗的成本。

summary.en: AI agents for global trade compliance.
summary.zh: 為全球貿易合規打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Trava audits customs entries and automates classification to help importers cut duty overpayments and filing errors, protecting margins and staying compliant.
highlight.zh: Trava 稽核報關項目並自動化分類，協助進口商減少關稅溢付與申報錯誤，在規模化下保護利潤並維持合規。

summary.en: Digital AI humans that model clothes for e-commerce brands.
summary.zh: 為電商品牌展示服裝的數位 AI 模特兒。

highlight.en: Bezel lets fashion brands upload clothing images, pick an AI model, and generate studio-quality photos and videos with every detail rendered flawlessly.
highlight.zh: Bezel 讓時尚品牌上傳服裝圖片、選擇 AI 模特兒，生成媲美攝影棚水準、細節呈現完美的照片與影片。

summary.en: AI for the physical world.
summary.zh: 用於實體世界的 AI。

highlight.en: General Trajectory uses AI to solve important physical-world problems, from autonomous defense to scientific R&D.
highlight.zh: General Trajectory 運用 AI 解決從自主國防到科學研發等重要的實體世界問題。

summary.en: AI agents for audit.
summary.zh: 為審計打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Tergle builds AI to replace auditors.
highlight.zh: Tergle 打造 AI 以取代審計人員。

summary.en: Reimagining how machines learn by training a custom learning system per agent.
summary.zh: 透過為每個代理訓練客製學習系統，重新想像機器的學習方式。

highlight.en: Lucidic emulates model training without changing weights, building a per-agent learning system so it learns what to remember and when to ask for help.
highlight.zh: Lucidic 在不改動權重下模擬模型訓練，為每個代理打造學習系統，使其學會記住什麼、培養技能，以及何時尋求協助。

summary.en: An AEO/GEO platform for e-commerce and retail brands.
summary.zh: 為電商與零售品牌打造的 AEO/GEO 平台。

highlight.en: Wildcard tracks how brands and SKUs appear across AI search like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Amazon Rufus, then enriches data to close visibility gaps.
highlight.zh: Wildcard 追蹤品牌與 SKU 在 ChatGPT、Google AI 摘要、Gemini、Amazon Rufus 的呈現，再豐富資料以彌補能見度缺口。

summary.en: AI agents and a unified data layer for revenue teams.
summary.zh: 為營收團隊打造的 AI 代理與統一資料層。

highlight.en: Ergo connects the conversations revenue teams already have across calls, email, and Slack, building a unified data layer that moves deals forward.
highlight.zh: Ergo 串接營收團隊在通話、電子郵件與 Slack 上既有的對話，打造推動成交的統一資料層。

summary.en: An agentic AI platform for pharma go-to-market teams.
summary.zh: 為製藥市場進入團隊打造的代理式 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Synthio Labs is the intelligence layer behind life sciences engagement, enabling compliant, continuous conversations across HCPs, patients, and field teams.
highlight.zh: Synthio Labs 是生命科學互動背後的智慧層，讓 HCP、病患與外勤團隊之間能進行合規且持續的對話。

summary.en: The agentic operating system for modern system integrators.
summary.zh: 為現代系統整合商打造的代理式作業系統。

highlight.en: Auctor brings alignment and intelligence to software implementation, helping every project deliver its intended value with clarity and precision.
highlight.zh: Auctor 為軟體導入帶來一致性與智慧，協助每個專案清晰、精準地交付其預期價值。

summary.en: An AI-optimized ticket resale platform for season ticket holders and brokers.
summary.zh: 為季票持有者與經紀商打造的 AI 優化票券轉售平台。

highlight.en: Ticket Wallet automates pricing, listing, and distribution across major marketplaces at 10% per ticket; it has onboarded $3M+ inventory and 100+ paying sellers.
highlight.zh: Ticket Wallet 跨各大市集自動化定價、上架與分銷，每票收 10%，已導入逾 300 萬美元庫存與 100 多位付費賣家。

summary.en: Function Health for Europe — actionable insights from regular blood testing.
summary.zh: 歐洲版的 Function Health，從定期血液檢測中提供可行洞察。

highlight.en: Lucis combines medical expertise and AI to turn regular blood testing into actionable insights that help people live healthier, longer lives.
highlight.zh: Lucis 結合醫療專業與 AI，將定期血液檢測轉化為可行的洞察，協助人們活得更健康、更長壽。

summary.en: Vertical AI agents that run the sales funnel on autopilot.
summary.zh: 自動運作銷售漏斗的垂直型 AI 代理。

highlight.en: throxy maps the full addressable market with proprietary scraping, then blends AI agents with human experts for hyper-personalized outbound into legacy sectors.
highlight.zh: throxy 以專有爬蟲繪製完整可觸及市場，再結合 AI 代理與人類專家，向傳統產業進行高度個人化的外撥開發。

summary.en: Intelligence infrastructure on people and entities.
summary.zh: 關於人物與實體的情報基礎設施。

highlight.en: Sixtyfour deploys AI agents to investigate people and companies across the open and dark web, official records, and proprietary data, surfacing risk signals.
highlight.zh: Sixtyfour 部署 AI 代理，橫跨明網與暗網、官方紀錄與專有資料庫調查人物與公司，解析身分並揭露風險訊號。

summary.en: An industrial data layer for robotics training.
summary.zh: 為機器人訓練打造的工業資料層。

highlight.en: Vision Lab captures real factory workflows at scale by combining first-person industrial video with SOP-level process knowledge for robotics and AI labs.
highlight.zh: Vision Lab 結合第一人稱工業影片與 SOP 級流程知識，大規模擷取真實工廠作業，供機器人與 AI 實驗室訓練使用。

summary.en: A 24/7 global stock exchange for traditional financial markets.
summary.zh: 面向傳統金融市場的全天候全球證券交易所。

highlight.en: Founded by quants from Citadel and Tower Research, QFEX offers brokerless trading of US equities, commodities, and FX with up to 100x leverage via perpetuals.
highlight.zh: 由 Citadel 與 Tower Research 量化人才創立，QFEX 透過永續期貨提供免券商、最高 100 倍槓桿的美股、商品與外匯交易。

summary.en: Autonomous security testing for web apps, APIs, cloud, and AI systems.
summary.zh: 針對網頁應用、API、雲端與 AI 系統的自主資安測試。

highlight.en: Trusted by 100+ companies like Gusto and CrewAI, Casco runs year-round autonomous security testing and produces pen-test reports for SOC2 and ISO27001.
highlight.zh: Casco 獲 Gusto、CrewAI 等逾百家公司信任，全年執行自主資安測試，並產出供 SOC2 與 ISO27001 合規的滲透測試報告。

summary.en: An AI mobile app QA tester that mimics a real human.
summary.zh: 模擬真人的 AI 行動應用品質保證測試員。

highlight.en: Built by founders who led engineering at Google across Android XR and Stadia, QualGent helps teams catch bugs and ship faster without hiring more QA testers.
highlight.zh: 由曾在 Google 領導 Android XR、Stadia 工程的創辦人打造，QualGent 助團隊抓錯並更快出貨，無需增聘 QA 測試員。

summary.en: An AI physics engine that replaces simulations and prototypes.
summary.zh: 取代模擬與原型的 AI 物理引擎。

highlight.en: Godela is an AI-powered physics engine giving engineers a faster, cheaper replacement for simulations and prototypes — just ask and get accurate results.
highlight.zh: Godela 是由 AI 驅動的物理引擎，為工程師提供更快、更便宜的模擬與原型替代方案，一問即得模擬等級的結果。

summary.en: A perpetual sandbox platform for AI agents that run code fast.
summary.zh: 為需快速執行程式碼的 AI 代理打造的永續沙箱平台。

highlight.en: Blaxel's sandboxes scale to zero after 1s of inactivity and resume in under 25ms with full memory state, co-locating agent logic for near-instant latency.
highlight.zh: Blaxel 的沙箱在閒置 1 秒後縮減至零，並能在 25 毫秒內帶完整記憶狀態恢復，並就近部署代理邏輯以提供近乎即時的延遲。
